title: synth_ecp5 -abc9 hits assert in abc: Gia_ManInsertMfs: Assertion `iLitNew >= 0' failed.
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue

The following code:

```
module register_file(
    input wire clk,
    input wire write_enable,
    input wire [63:0] write_data,
    input wire [4:0] write_reg,
    input wire [4:0] read1_reg,
    output reg [63:0] read1_data,
    );

    reg [63:0] registers[0:31];

    always @(posedge clk) begin
      if (write_enable == 1'b1) begin
        registers[write_reg] <= write_data;
      end
    end

    always @(all) begin
      read1_data <= registers[read1_reg];
    end
endmodule
```

Hits an assert in abc:
```
# yosys -p "read_verilog register_file.v; synth_ecp5 -abc9"
```
```
ABC: yosys-abc: src/aig/gia/giaMfs.c:348: Gia_ManInsertMfs: Assertion `iLitNew >= 0' failed.
```
code_blocks:
module register_file(
    input wire clk,
    input wire write_enable,
    input wire [63:0] write_data,
    input wire [4:0] write_reg,
    input wire [4:0] read1_reg,
    output reg [63:0] read1_data,
    );

    reg [63:0] registers[0:31];

    always @(posedge clk) begin
      if (write_enable == 1'b1) begin
        registers[write_reg] <= write_data;
      end
    end

    always @(all) begin
      read1_data <= registers[read1_reg];
    end
endmodule
ABC: yosys-abc: src/aig/gia/giaMfs.c:348: Gia_ManInsertMfs: Assertion `iLitNew >= 0' failed.
